creator: astralblue@usa.net
text:
Attached is a patch file which should fix this problem.  Put the file in
apache13/patches and rebuild the port.

NB: not only this, but a *lot* of ports are broken on -4.0 because their
configuration scripts (notably autoconf) not knowing how to deal with
the `unknown' FreeBSD 4.0.  The only fix seems to be using individual
patch files until the scripts are fixed in the distribution.  Grrrr.

Eugene

--------------------------------- snip ---------------------------------
